ddls:
CREATE TABLE "diaries" (
  "diary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diary */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the diary */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the diary */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the diary */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the diary */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the diary */,
  "language" TEXT /* The language in which the diary is written */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the diary (e.g., active, archived, draft) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the diary was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the diary was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diary entry */,
  "diary_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the diary the entry belongs to */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date of the diary entry */,
  "entry_time" TEXT /* Time of the diary entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity recorded in the diary entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the entry was recorded */,
  "content" TEXT /* The full text of the diary entry */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the entry */,
  "mood" TEXT /* The mood of the author at the time of the entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_diary_id FOREIGN KEY ("diary_id") REFERENCES diaries ("diary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "place_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* The full address of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* The elevation of the location (in meters) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the activity */,
  "category" TEXT /* The category of the activity (e.g., movement, social, work) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the activity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the activity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., historian, researcher, educator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* A hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* The institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the diary entry being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the annotation */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or annotation text */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* The type of annotation (e.g., comment, note, highlight) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the annotation is public or private */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the diary entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the diary entry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user accessing the entry */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the entry */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the access was successful */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES entries ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
